name: Fenix OpenCode Space
postCreateCommand:
npm install -g opencode-ai@latest @google/gemini-cli @openai/codex @qwen-code/qwen-code@latest && curl -fsSL https://cli.kiro.dev/install | bash && curl -fsSL https://www.nvidia.com/nemoclaw.sh | bash && echo '
.opencode_data/' >> .gitignore && mkdir -p $(pwd)/.opencode_data && mkdir -p ~/.local/share && ln -sfn $(pwd)/.opencode_data ~/.local/share/opencode
